name: DeepSteve Core
description: Session info, session close, issue spawning, terminal spawning

tools.name: get_session_info
tools.description: Get session metadata by deepsteve session ID

tools.name: close_session
tools.description: Close a session and its browser tab

tools.name: start_issue
tools.description: Open a new deepsteve session for a GitHub issue

tools.name: open_terminal
tools.description: Open a new terminal session with an optional prompt
